title: Draft RBI (Local Area Banks – Classification, Valuation & Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
The Reserve Bank of India has proposed deleting IFR-related provisions and consolidating capital treatment norms. The amendment reduces regulatory complexity and enhances clarity in investment portfolio management.
The post Draft RBI (Local Area Banks – Classification, Valuation & Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
